# Discussion or closing chapter

Closing chapter placeholder. Replace with whatever wraps your book.

Cross-chapter citation reuse works as expected — the manubot paper
[@doi:10.1371/journal.pcbi.1007128] appeared in the introduction; here
it resolves to the same cached metadata without a second network
round-trip.

## What CI does

On every push to `main`:

1. Renders the book to `_book/` using Quarto, with all
   persistent-identifier citations resolved against Crossref, PubMed,
   arXiv, etc.
2. Substitutes the per-commit SHA into the version banner.
3. Stages the rendered site under `public/v/<full-sha>/` (immutable)
   and `public/` (latest).
4. Deploys to GitHub Pages via the `gh-pages` branch.
5. Posts a sticky comment on every PR linking to the per-PR preview.

The banner at the top of every page links to the immutable snapshot of
the commit that produced it. A downloaded chapter HTML always tells you
which version it is.
